sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47999" key="qeeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (θεός᾽</foreign> <sense id="n47999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θεοειδής, [ἄνθρωπος] πάντων θηρίων θεειδέστατον</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
